question: What is the total weight of the new feed I purchased in the past two months?

retrieval_results.context:
User purchased a 50-pound batch of layer feed.
User purchased 20 pounds of organic scratch grains for chickens.
Increase the proportion of new feed over the next 7-10 days until feeding 100% new layer feed.
User added two new hens to the flock.
User noticed an improvement in egg quality after adding new layer feed.
Store some of the old feed in case a reversion is needed after transition.
User received a 10% discount on layer feed purchase.
Ensure equal access to new feed and add extra feeding stations to prevent bullying.
Cost per pound of layer feed is $2.16.
Net cost of layer feed after discount is $108.
